jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Upstox
jsonLd.description:
Upstox is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Upstox:
Upstox is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Upstox!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
